visual_identity: small solid rounded square body, two tiny white dot eyes, two thin legs, slightly shaky black hand-drawn line, serious quiet slightly absurd worker energy
core_role: A working participant inside the concept, never a decorative mascot.

action_library.prompt_snippet: The character carries a heavy bundle of mixed paper scraps into the scene.
The character pulls a rope connected to the main mechanism.
The character sorts small blocks into simple physical piles.
The character repairs a patched low-tech machine with a tiny wrench.
The character hands a small parcel to the next station.

deformation_rules.description: The square body gently becomes a recognizable funnel shape.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Conditionally deform the square worker into a simple recognizable funnel-like body while keeping the two white dot eyes and thin legs.

deformation_rules.description: The worker is partially stuck in a simple machine.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Show the square worker lightly stuck in the machine, still recognizable.

deformation_rules.description: The worker is compressed flat by pressure.
deformation_rules.prompt_snippet: Show the square worker mildly compressed flat, still recognizable.
